author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit df6aa47. CONTRIBUTING.md (setup/MSRV, crate map, local CI gates, behavioral-test + byte-faithful-metadata expectations, bench/fuzz extras, the #103 fuzz-workspace cwd footgun, dual-license clause), .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE bug+feature templates (triage-oriented: version/install/minimal-repro/exit-code; feature asks for concrete task + JSON op sketch), PR template mirroring CI gates, README links CONTRIBUTING. 25 suites green, clippy/fmt clean.
